options.C: Resorption of posterior border of ramus
options.D: Apposition of lower border of mandible

Option B mentions resorption of the anterior border of ramus. Anterior border would be more towards the front of the face, near where other structures might be. But again, not sure if this contributes to space behind for molars.

Option C is resorption of posterior border of ramus. Posterior border being closer to the back of the mouth, perhaps allowing expansion or creating a gap?
